title: dianthus recognitus
intro: Dianthus recognitus, also known as the Cheddar Pink, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dianthus recognitus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Dianthus recognitus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
